headline: AVO Stock Rises 14% in a Year: Buying Opportunity or Risky Timing?
summary: Mission Produce climbs 14.1% in a year, outperforming its industry but lagging the S&P 500, driven by strong avocado demand and expansion - buy or risky timing?

headline: ServiceNow, Alibaba, Archer-Daniels-Midland And More On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
summary: Alibaba shares gained 0.5% to close at $133.26 on Monday while ServiceNow gained 8.8% to settle at $103.42 during the session.
